backend/main.mo: Motoko canister storing content sections, quiz questions, and printable guides with query methods for retrieval and quiz scoring.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features, affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of various frontend components and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining light and dark OKLCH theme variables and global element styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring React Query and rendering header, content area, and footer.
frontend/src/components/EducationalConte: Main content interface with tab navigation for scanner, educational sections, quiz, and guides, including pest selection.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer showing attribution, copyright, and informational disclaimer.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header with app branding using a bug icon and title text.
frontend/src/components/pests/MiceConten: Presents educational content on identifying, detecting, and understanding mouse habits and risks.
frontend/src/components/pests/ScorpionsC: Displays safety guidance and identification details for scorpions, including species traits and habitats.
frontend/src/components/PhotoScanner.tsx: Photo capture and editing tool with camera support, image processing, and local gallery management.
Displays downloadable PDF guides for a quiz section, handling loading, empty states, and file downloads.
frontend/src/components/Quiz.tsx: Renders a multi-question quiz with answer selection, feedback, progress tracking, and result calculation.
frontend/src/components/SavedScansGaller: Shows a gallery of saved scans with tag filtering, reordering, deletion, and tag editing options.
frontend/src/components/SavedScanTagsEdi: Provides UI for adding, editing, and removing tags on saved scans with inline editing support.
frontend/src/components/sections/Habitat: React section component displaying bed bug habitat info with images and descriptive text across several cards.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeatTre: Alert dialog component that shows safety reminders before using the heat‑treatment checklist and manages confirm/cancel focus behavior.
frontend/src/components/sections/Identif: UI section describing how to identify bed bugs, including images and short explanations of adults, life stages, and bite marks.
frontend/src/components/sections/Prevent: Section outlining prevention strategies for bed bugs with images and tips for travel, used furniture, and household precautions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Treatme: Treatment checklist UI with before/during/after steps, progress tracking hooks, and a reminder dialog lock before interacting.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and invalidates dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeatTreatmentCheck: Hook managing heat‑treatment checklist progress with localStorage persistence, toggle/reset helpers, and completion stats.
Manages confirmation and visibility state for a heat‑treatment checklist reminder using localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageEditor.ts: Provides image editing state and operations such as rotation, zoom, enhancement, and export.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity context/provider for login, identity persistence, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching quiz questions, results, and printable guides through an actor API.
frontend/src/hooks/useSavedScans.ts: Handles loading, saving, ordering, and tagging of image scans stored in localStorage.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets Tailwind layers and theme variables for light and dark modes plus utility styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentity providers.
frontend/src/utils/imageProcessing.ts: Implements image processing helpers including rotation, enhancement, zooming, and cropping.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS config enabling dark mode, custom colors, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: JSON file describing the project’s state, feature list, image requirements, and metadata for the pest education app.
